global_summary.note: Sum of 20 tracked vendors (adjusted for overlap). Actual global total likely 280-400T including self-hosted/private deployments.
global_summary.update_method: MAJOR UPDATE: Volcengine official disclosure at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026) — Doubao 120T/day confirmed. This is the first direct official figure since Jan 2026. Previous 69.2T was extrapolated from Jan 2026 baseline. Revision cascades global total from 183T to 234T (+28%).

token_gdp.note: Blended price per vendor region. US ~$1.50/M tokens, EU ~$1.20/M, CN ~$0.10/M.
token_gdp.key_insight: China generates 61% of global tokens but only 10% of Token GDP. US generates 34% of tokens but 81% of Token GDP. Pricing gap: 15x. Doubao alone accounts for 51% of global token volume.

key_stats.344x_headline: A US user generates 357× more AI tokens per day than an Indian user
key_stats.great_divergence: China: 61% of tokens, 10% of Token GDP. US: 34% of tokens, 81% of Token GDP.
key_stats.doubao_note: Doubao alone accounts for 51% of global token volume as of Apr 2026 (official Volcengine disclosure)

vendors.name: Doubao (ByteDance)
vendors.source: OFFICIAL: Volcengine disclosure at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026) — 120T/day confirmed by ByteDance. Reported by Xinzhiyuan (新智元). This supersedes all prior extrapolations.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from Volcano Engine Q3 2025 disclosure
14-day extrapolation at 8%/mo. Supported by Doubao 2.0 launch + 155M WAU + Spring Festival peak of 63.3B tokens/min
7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Mar 16 baseline. No new hard data. ByteDance halted global rollout of Seedance 2.0 (copyright dispute) — no direct impact on Doubao LLM volume.
7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Mar 23 baseline. No new Doubao usage data this week. ByteDance ongoing focus on agentic tools.

OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Source: Xinzhiyuan report https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uc6NWmhNBzmsChN9xJdz_w. Previous estimate 69.2T was extrapolation from Jan 2026 baseline — actual figure is 73% higher. This makes Doubao alone responsible for 51% of global token volume.

vendors.name: Google Gemini (All Surfaces)
vendors.source: OFFICIAL: Pichai Q4 2025 earnings (Feb 4, 2026): 'Gemini now processes over 10 billion tokens per minute via direct API use by our customers' = 14.4T/day API-only. 750M MAU (TechCrunch Feb 4, 2026). 85B API requests/month Jan 2026 (tech-insider.org). 2.4M API developers, 118% YoY growth.
vendors.note: All Surfaces = Search AI Overviews + Gemini App (750M MAU) + Workspace + Cloud API. HARD DATA: Pichai confirmed 10B tokens/min via direct API (Feb 4) = 14.4T/day API-only. Up from 7B tokens/min prior quarter (+43%). 85B API req/month Jan 2026. All Surfaces total estimated 55T. Gemini 3 Flash processing 1T+ daily API requests (Business Analytics Jan 25).

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate using Q4 2025 API-only metric
Revised to All Surfaces scope for apple-to-apple comparison
Growth rate bumped to 8%/mo based on 643% YoY (Mar 9 article). 750M MAU confirmed.

7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo. New data: 85B API req/month Jan 2026 (tech-insider.org), 750M active users confirmed, 118% YoY developer growth (2.4M devs). Google replacing Assistant with Gemini on Android accelerates penetration.
7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo. Gemini 3 Pro rolling out globally with upgraded reasoning — volume accelerant. No new hard request/token figures disclosed.

ANCHORED BY OFFICIAL DATA: Pichai Q4 2025 earnings (Feb 4, 2026) confirmed 10B tokens/min via direct API = 14.4T/day API-only (up from 7B/min prior quarter). All Surfaces (API + App 750M MAU + Search AI Overviews + Workspace) estimated 55T. Confidence upgraded medium→medium-high based on official API throughput anchor. Gemini 3 Flash processing 1T+ daily API requests since Jan 2026.

vendors.name: OpenAI (ChatGPT + API)
vendors.source: 900M WAU (Feb 27, 2026), 2.5B prompts/day, 50M subscribers. #1 app (Mar 2026). $852B valuation, $24B ARR ($2B/mo revenue as of Mar 31, 2026 per TechCrunch/Reuters). $122B funding round closed Mar 31.
vendors.note: HARD DATA: $24B ARR confirmed Mar 31, 2026 ($2B/mo). Revenue back-calc at blended ~$1.5/M: 24B/1.5/365=43.8T/day theoretical max. But 2.5B prompts × 12K tokens = 30T/day consumer+API baseline remains more conservative anchor. Revenue growth $5B→$24B ARR in 6 months reflects enterprise pricing uplift, not just volume. 32T conservative floor maintained.

revision_history.reason: Initial estimate from $5B ARR at blended ~$2/M tokens (Sep 2025 baseline)
Sep 2025 baseline × 1.15^5 months growth = 38T theoretical; conservative floor 28T
Validated by 2.5B prompts/day (Feb 27 disclosure). 2.5B × 12K tokens ≈ 30T. Confidence upgraded medium-low→medium.
7-day extrapolation at 15%/mo. New: #1 app Apple+Google stores Mar 2026. No new hard token data; growth signals positive.

7-day extrapolation at 15%/mo. KEY SIGNAL: GPT-5.4 mini + nano launched Mar 17 — 2× faster, $0.75/M input tokens (designed for 'high-volume workloads'). Codex subagents, computer-use, and API volume all boost inference throughput. No new user-count disclosure.

HARD DATA: $24B ARR confirmed Mar 31, 2026 ($2B/mo revenue, TechCrunch/Reuters). $852B valuation, $122B funding round closed. Revenue back-calc suggests 44T/day theoretical max at blended $1.5/M, but 2.5B prompts × 12K tokens = 30T consumer baseline remains conservative anchor. Revenue growth partly from pricing uplift (enterprise >40% of revenue). Confidence upgraded medium→medium-high. Value held at 32T pending direct token data.

vendors.name: Claude (Anthropic)
vendors.source: CONFIRMED: $19B ARR as of end-Feb 2026 (The Information Mar 24, Yahoo Finance Mar 4, Forbes Mar 25). SemiAnalysis (Apr 1) reports $25B+ ARR now. Claude Code $2.5B ARR (Feb 2026). Enterprise subs +4.9% MoM. 24.4% biz AI share.
vendors.note: ARR timeline: $9B (end 2025) → $14B (mid-Feb, CFO court filing) → $19B (end-Feb/early-Mar per The Information/Yahoo/Forbes) → $25B+ (Apr 1 per SemiAnalysis). Claude Code $2.5B ARR in Feb. Revenue growth 19×/14mo. Revenue-to-token back-calc at $3/M blended: $19B/3/365=17.4T/day. Conservative 14.6T held pending direct token data.

revision_history.reason: HARD DATA: Anthropic disclosed $19B ARR run-rate (mid-Mar 2026 per CRN). Revenue ratio 19/14=1.36× → 15T theoretical; conservative 13T. Claude Code WAU doubled since Jan 1; enterprise $100K+ customers grew 7×. Growth rate revised to 18%/mo.

HARD DATA: The Register (Mar 19) cites CFO court filing confirming $14B ARR + $5B cumulative revenue. Claude Code $2.5B+ ARR (enterprise >50%). Business subs +4.9% MoM Feb; new biz chooses Anthropic 70% of time. 7-day extrapolation at 18%/mo: 13T→14T. Note: $19B ARR from CRN vs $14B from CFO court filing — unresolved; using $14B as conservative. Market share: 24.4% biz AI (gaining fast from 34.4% OpenAI).
7-day extrapolation at 18%/mo from Mar 23 baseline. No new hard data this week. Claude Opus 4.6 (Feb 5 launch) continues to drive enterprise adoption. Growth rate sustained.

ARR RESOLVED: $14B vs $19B — both correct at different time points. Timeline: $9B (end 2025) → $14B (mid-Feb, CFO court filing) → $19B (end-Feb per The Information Mar 24/Yahoo Finance Mar 4) → $25B+ (SemiAnalysis Apr 1). Revenue back-calc at $3/M: 17.4T/day. Conservative 14.6T held. Confidence upgraded medium→medium-high with multiple corroborating sources.

vendors.name: DeepSeek
vendors.source: 130M MAU by early 2026 (BusinessOfApps). V4 Lite launched Mar 2026. 0.2% US chatbot market share. 175M+ downloads. No direct token throughput disclosure.
vendors.note: 130M MAU by early 2026 (up from 81.6M WAU). V4 Lite launched Mar 2026 — accelerant. No official token throughput data. DeepSeek remains free/open-source with no disclosed API volume metrics. Value held at 8.1T pending hard data.

revision_history.reason: Held at 8T. No new usage data. Growth rate revised to 8%/mo (Dec 2025 traffic showed MoM decline). Multiverse Computing model compression (Mar 19) signals ecosystem maturity.
Held at 8T. No new usage data. 7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo yields negligible change.
No new hard token data. 130M MAU by early 2026 (BusinessOfApps). V4 Lite launched Mar 2026 as growth accelerant. Still no direct token throughput disclosure from DeepSeek. Value held.

vendors.name: ERNIE (Baidu)
vendors.source: Ernie 5.0 launched Jan 2026 (SCMP), 200M MAU. Q2 2024: 1T tokens/day, 600M API calls/day (EET-China). Feb 2025: 16.5B daily API calls (TechNode). Ernie 4.5 open-source (Apache 2.0). Juejin Mar 2026: 13M+ C-end active users.

revision_history.reason: 7-day extrapolation holds at 1.7T (growth rate 5%/mo, small increment).

Source updated: Ernie 5.0 launched Jan 2026 with 200M MAU (SCMP). 2.4T-parameter multimodal model. Ernie 4.5 open-sourced (Apache 2.0). Q2 2024 hard data: 1T tokens/day, 600M API calls/day. Feb 2025: 16.5B daily calls (33× YoY growth). Value held at 1.72T — Ernie 5.0 likely boost growth rate but no new hard token count. Source_date updated to Jan 2026 for Ernie 5.0 reference.

vendors.name: Kimi (Moonshot AI)
vendors.source: OpenRouter Feb 2026: K2.5 consumed 4.02T tokens/month = 0.134T/day on OpenRouter alone. Kimi app + API platform total estimated 10-15×. $100M ARR (technews.tw Mar 31). $18B valuation. 20 days revenue > 2025 full year (Sohu Mar 30).

revision_history.reason: MAJOR REVISION: OpenRouter Feb data shows K2.5 consumed 4.02T tokens/month = 0.134T/day on OpenRouter alone (TTV/HKEJ). K2.5 briefly ranked #1 globally surpassing Gemini (Zhihu Mar 15). $100M ARR confirmed (technews.tw Mar 31). 20 days revenue surpassed 2025 full year (Sohu Mar 30). $18B valuation (4× in 3 months). Previous 0.18T was massive undercount — OpenRouter is small fraction of total Kimi usage. Conservative 1.5T estimate.

correction_log.reason: OFFICIAL DISCLOSURE: Volcengine announced 120T/day at Wuhan AI Innovation Expo (Apr 1, 2026). Reported by Xinzhiyuan. Previous estimate was extrapolated from Jan 2026 baseline — actual is +73% higher. Source: https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/uc6NWmhNBzmsChN9xJdz_w
Cascade from Doubao official 120T disclosure. China now 61% of global volume (up from 50%). Doubao alone = 51% of global total. CN Token GDP share: 6%→10%.
Cascade from volume upgrades. US: 79T (+$4.5M/day). CN: 91T (+$0.1M/day). Global Token GDP: $141.9M/day milestone.

KEY SIGNAL: GPT-5.4 mini (Mar 17) + nano — 2× faster than GPT-5.4, $0.75/$4.50 per M tokens, 400K context, designed explicitly for 'high-volume workloads'. Codex CLI/IDE subagents now run GPT-5.4 mini at 30% quota. Computer use, API multi-agent patterns all drive inference volume. No new hard WAU/prompt count. 7-day extrapolation at 15%/mo: 31T→32.0T.
7-day extrapolation from Mar 23 baseline. Doubao: 68T→69.2T; Gemini: 54T→55.0T; OpenAI: 31T→32.0T (GPT-5.4 mini+nano high-volume launch); Claude: 14T→14.6T; Azure: 7.8T→8.0T. Cascade: 183T/day.

HARD DATA: The Register (Mar 19) cites Anthropic CFO court filing: $14B ARR company-wide, $5B cumulative revenue. Claude Code alone $2.5B+ ARR (>50% enterprise). Business subscriptions +4.9% MoM (Feb); new businesses choose Anthropic 70% of the time; 24.4% biz AI market share (growing vs OpenAI's declining 34.4%). 7-day extrapolation at 18%/mo + enterprise acceleration: 13T→14T. Note: CRN $19B vs The Register $14B ARR discrepancy — using conservative $14B.

New supporting data: 85B API requests in January 2026 (tech-insider.org), 118% YoY API developer growth to 2.4M devs, 200%+ YoY traffic growth. Google replacing Google Assistant with Gemini across Android in 2026 accelerating penetration. 7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo: 53T→54T.
7-day extrapolation at 15%/mo. New context: OpenAI hit #1 app on Apple+Google stores (Mar 2026). No new hard token data. 30T→31T.
7-day extrapolation at 8%/mo from Mar 16 baseline. No new Doubao usage data. Note: ByteDance halted global Seedance 2.0 rollout (copyright dispute, Mar 17) — no impact on domestic LLM volume.
Cascade: Claude +1T, Gemini +1T, OpenAI +1T, Doubao +1T, Azure/Qwen/Hunyuan minor bumps. New global total 179T/day after overlap correction.
Cascade from volume upgrades. US region: 74T→76T (+$4.5M/day). CN: 89T→90T (+$0.1M/day). Global daily GDP crosses $136M milestone.

HARD DATA: Anthropic disclosed $19B ARR run-rate (mid-Mar 2026 per CRN). Previous $14B ARR → 11T. Revenue ratio 19/14=1.357 → 15T theoretical; conservative 13T. Claude Code WAU doubled since Jan 1; enterprise $100K+ customers grew 7×. Growth rate revised to 18%/mo.
Cascade: Anthropic +2T, Doubao +1T (extrapolation), Qwen/Azure/Grok minor bumps. New global total 175T/day.
14-day extrapolation from Feb 27 baseline. Key new data: OpenAI 900M WAU + 2.5B prompts/day, Gemini 643% YoY growth, Doubao 2.0 launch with 155M WAU.
Sep 2025 baseline × 15%/mo growth × 5 months, conservative floor. Source date updated to Feb 2026.
